reference: There is a slight dull pain on the right side of my head that gets worse the more active I am. It happened to me once last week, but then went away. I feel it again right now, and it is so area-specific I feel like I could trace out the area with a marker where my head is shaved, but it is not a very strong pain. On a scale from one to ten, I would put it at a one point five to two at most, but it can get up to about a six. What do you think?
text: There is a slight dull pain on the right side of my head that gets worse the more active I am. It happened to me once last week, but then went away. I feel it again right now, and it is so area specific. I feel like I can trace out the area with a marker where my head is shaved, but it is not a very strong pain. On a scale from one to ten, I would put it at a one point five to two at most, but it can get up to about a six. What do you think?
